files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections for October, each covering different subject areas: Theology and Testimony, Work and Business, Literature, and Social Service. Each lesson has its own outline, content, and discussion questions. There are also some advertisements and a poem at the end that appear to be part of the overall magazine layout.
